div1.entryFree:
Creek, 1) a small river: I'll throw it into the c. behind our rock, and let it to the sea, Cymb. IV, 2, 151 (cf. 184: I have sent Cloten's clotpoll down the stream).
2) a narrow passage, alley, lane: one that countermands the passages of alleys, --s and narrow lands, Err. IV, 2, 38.
